requirement_topic.en: Photobiological Safety — Blue Light Hazard (IMANOR NM adopting IEC 62471 vs CN GB/T 20145)
requirement_topic.zh: 光生物安全——蓝光危害（IMANOR NM 采用 IEC 62471 vs 中国 GB/T 20145）
requirement_topic.zht: 光生物安全——藍光危害（IMANOR NM 採用 IEC 62471 vs 中國 GB/T 20145）

summary.en: Morocco addresses photobiological (blue light) safety of LED lamps and luminaires through IMANOR NM standards that adopt IEC 62471 (Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems). The method classifies products into risk groups from RG0 (Exempt) to RG3 (High risk) based on blue-light-weighted radiance/irradiance. Where the product is within the regulated electrical-product scope handled under the Ministry of Industry import-conformity process, a defensible risk-group assessment to the IEC 62471-based NM standard is expected as part of the safety evidence, presented via the in-country importer. Morocco does not operate an EU-style energy-label blue-light-class declaration; the photobiological requirement here is the risk-group classification itself, derived from the NM/IEC 62471 method.
summary.zh: 摩洛哥通过采用 IEC 62471（灯和灯系统的光生物安全）的 IMANOR NM 标准处理 LED 灯及灯具的光生物（蓝光）安全。该方法依据蓝光加权辐亮度/辐照度将产品分为 RG0（豁免）至 RG3（高危险）危险组别。当产品属于工业部进口符合性流程下的受管制电气产品范围时，须将依据 IEC 62471 NM 标准的可辩护危险组别评估作为安全证据的一部分，经在摩进口商提交。摩洛哥不实行欧盟式能效标签蓝光等级声明；此处的光生物要求即为危险组别分类本身，由 NM/IEC 62471 方法得出。
summary.zht: 摩洛哥通過採用 IEC 62471（燈和燈系統的光生物安全）的 IMANOR NM 標準處理 LED 燈及燈具的光生物（藍光）安全。該方法依據藍光加權輻亮度/輻照度將產品分為 RG0（豁免）至 RG3（高危險）危險組別。當產品屬於工業部進口符合性流程下的受管制電氣產品範圍時，須將依據 IEC 62471 NM 標準的可辯護危險組別評估作為安全證據的一部分，經在摩進口商提交。摩洛哥不實行歐盟式能效標籤藍光等級聲明；此處的光生物要求即為危險組別分類本身，由 NM/IEC 62471 方法得出。

standards_or_laws: IMANOR NM standard adopting IEC 62471 — photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (risk-group classification)
Ministry of Industry import-conformity / attestation process for regulated electrical products (photobiological evidence reviewed within it where in scope)

summary.en: China has adopted GB/T 20145-2006 (Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems), technically equivalent to IEC 62471:2006. GB/T 20145 is a recommended standard (T = tuijian, recommended) and is not universally mandatory for all LED luminaires in the Chinese market; enforcement for residential luminaires is limited. The risk-group methodology (RG0 to RG3) is shared with the Moroccan NM/IEC 62471 basis, so existing CN photobiological test data may be reusable as supporting evidence.
summary.zh: 中国已采用 GB/T 20145-2006（灯和灯系统的光生物安全），技术上等同于 IEC 62471:2006。GB/T 20145 为推荐性标准（T = 推荐），并非对所有中国市场 LED 灯具均为强制要求；对居民灯具的执行有限。危险组别方法（RG0 至 RG3）与摩洛哥 NM/IEC 62471 基础共享，故现有中国光生物检测数据可作为支撑证据复用。
summary.zht: 中國已採用 GB/T 20145-2006（燈和燈系統的光生物安全），技術上等同於 IEC 62471:2006。GB/T 20145 為推薦性標準（T = 推薦），並非對所有中國市場 LED 燈具均為強制要求；對居民燈具的執行有限。危險組別方法（RG0 至 RG3）與摩洛哥 NM/IEC 62471 基礎共享，故現有中國光生物檢測數據可作為支撐證據複用。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20145-2006 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (SAC/SAMR — recommended standard, equivalent to IEC 62471:2006)

gap.en: The IEC 62471 risk-group methodology is shared, so test data may be reusable, but the gaps are: (1) CN GB/T 20145 is recommended-only and frequently not enforced for residential LED luminaires, so a Chinese factory may not hold a photobiological assessment at all — for Morocco a defensible risk-group classification to the NM/IEC 62471 method should be documented where the product is in regulated scope; (2) the assessment is presented within the Moroccan import-conformity process via the in-country importer, not as an EU energy-label class; (3) RG2/RG3 products typically attract usage warnings and may face restrictions, so high-radiance products should be classified before shipment; (4) confirm with the importer whether the specific product/category triggers a formal photobiological evidence requirement under the current Moroccan conformity scope.
gap.zh: IEC 62471 危险组别方法共享，故检测数据可能可复用，但差距在于：（1）中国 GB/T 20145 仅为推荐性，居民 LED 灯具常不强制执行，故中国工厂可能根本未持有光生物评估——对摩洛哥而言，当产品处于受管制范围时，应记录依据 NM/IEC 62471 方法的可辩护危险组别分类；（2）该评估在摩洛哥进口符合性流程内、经在摩进口商提交，而非作为欧盟能效标签等级；（3）RG2/RG3 产品通常须附使用警告并可能受限，故高辐亮度产品应在装运前完成分类；（4）请与进口商确认具体产品/类别在当前摩洛哥符合性范围下是否触发正式光生物证据要求。
gap.zht: IEC 62471 危險組別方法共享，故檢測數據可能可複用，但差距在於：（1）中國 GB/T 20145 僅為推薦性，居民 LED 燈具常不強制執行，故中國工廠可能根本未持有光生物評估——對摩洛哥而言，當產品處於受管制範圍時，應記錄依據 NM/IEC 62471 方法的可辯護危險組別分類；（2）該評估在摩洛哥進口符合性流程內、經在摩進口商提交，而非作為歐盟能效標籤等級；（3）RG2/RG3 產品通常須附使用警告並可能受限，故高輻亮度產品應在裝運前完成分類；（4）請與進口商確認具體產品/類別在當前摩洛哥符合性範圍下是否觸發正式光生物證據要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where in regulated scope — a risk-group classification to the IEC 62471-based NM standard is expected as part of the safety evidence within the Ministry of Industry import-conformity process; no separate energy-label blue-light-class declaration
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended — GB/T 20145-2006 is a recommended (non-mandatory) standard; enforcement for residential luminaires is not universally prescribed

source.publisher: IMANOR — Institut Marocain de Normalisation (Moroccan Institute of Standardisation)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Morocco addresses LED photobiological safety through an IMANOR NM standard adopting IEC 62471 (risk groups RG0 to RG3), with a defensible classification expected within the Ministry of Industry import-conformity process where the product is in regulated scope. The IEC 62471 method is shared with CN GB/T 20145, so test data may be reusable, but GB/T 20145 is recommended-only and a Chinese factory may hold no assessment — document a risk-group classification and present it via the in-country importer; RG2/RG3 products need usage warnings.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 摩洛哥通过采用 IEC 62471（危险组别 RG0 至 RG3）的 IMANOR NM 标准处理 LED 光生物安全，当产品处于受管制范围时，须在工业部进口符合性流程内提供可辩护分类。IEC 62471 方法与中国 GB/T 20145 共享，故检测数据可能可复用，但 GB/T 20145 仅为推荐性，中国工厂可能未持有评估——请记录危险组别分类并经在摩进口商提交；RG2/RG3 产品须附使用警告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 摩洛哥通過採用 IEC 62471（危險組別 RG0 至 RG3）的 IMANOR NM 標準處理 LED 光生物安全，當產品處於受管制範圍時，須在工業部進口符合性流程內提供可辯護分類。IEC 62471 方法與中國 GB/T 20145 共享，故檢測數據可能可複用，但 GB/T 20145 僅為推薦性，中國工廠可能未持有評估——請記錄危險組別分類並經在摩進口商提交；RG2/RG3 產品須附使用警告。

requirement_topic.en: Lamp Performance and Self-Ballasted LED Lamp Conformity (IMANOR NM adopting IEC 62560 vs CN GB)
requirement_topic.zh: 灯性能与自镇流 LED 灯符合性（IMANOR NM 采用 IEC 62560 vs 中国 GB）
requirement_topic.zht: 燈性能與自鎮流 LED 燈符合性（IMANOR NM 採用 IEC 62560 vs 中國 GB）

summary.en: For self-ballasted LED lamps (retrofit bulbs with E27/B22 and similar caps), Morocco's product anchor is an IMANOR NM standard adopting IEC 62560 (Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services — safety specifications) together with the IEC 62471 photobiological method. IEC 62560 covers marking, interchangeability of lamp caps, protection against accidental contact with live parts, insulation resistance, mechanical strength, and fault conditions for self-ballasted retrofit lamps. Conformity to the applicable NM standard is reviewed for regulated lamps within the Ministry of Industry import-conformity process and is presented through the in-country importer; cap/interface conformity is important for the Moroccan 220 V, 50 Hz single-phase grid.
summary.zh: 对于自镇流 LED 灯（带 E27/B22 等灯头的替换型灯泡），摩洛哥的产品锚点是采用 IEC 62560（普通照明用自镇流 LED 灯——安全要求）的 IMANOR NM 标准，并配合 IEC 62471 光生物方法。IEC 62560 涵盖标志、灯头互换性、防意外接触带电部件、绝缘电阻、机械强度及自镇流替换灯的故障状态。对于受管制的灯，适用 NM 标准的符合性在工业部进口符合性流程内审查，并经在摩进口商提交；灯头/接口符合性对摩洛哥 220 V、50 Hz 单相电网很重要。
summary.zht: 對於自鎮流 LED 燈（帶 E27/B22 等燈頭的替換型燈泡），摩洛哥的產品錨點是採用 IEC 62560（普通照明用自鎮流 LED 燈——安全要求）的 IMANOR NM 標準，並配合 IEC 62471 光生物方法。IEC 62560 涵蓋標誌、燈頭互換性、防意外接觸帶電部件、絕緣電阻、機械強度及自鎮流替換燈的故障狀態。對於受管制的燈，適用 NM 標準的符合性在工業部進口符合性流程內審查，並經在摩進口商提交；燈頭/接口符合性對摩洛哥 220 V、50 Hz 單相電網很重要。

standards_or_laws: IMANOR NM standard adopting IEC 62560 — self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services, safety specifications
IMANOR NM standard adopting IEC 62471 — photobiological safety (applied together for self-ballasted LED lamps)

summary.en: China's equivalent for self-ballasted LED lamp safety is GB 24906-2010 (Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services with supply voltages above 50 V — safety requirements), aligned with IEC 62560, with performance addressed by GB/T 24908. CCC certification may apply to self-ballasted LED lamps in certain scopes. Chinese caps and voltage ratings are designed for the CN grid (single-phase 220 V, 50 Hz nominal, similar to Morocco), but CCC certification and GB test reports are issued in the Chinese framework and are not the Moroccan import-conformity deliverable.
summary.zh: 中国对应的自镇流 LED 灯安全标准为 GB 24906-2010（普通照明用、电源电压大于 50 V 的自镇流 LED 灯——安全要求），与 IEC 62560 对齐，性能由 GB/T 24908 规范。CCC 认证在特定范围内可能适用于自镇流 LED 灯。中国灯头及电压额定值按中国电网设计（单相 220 V、50 Hz 标称，与摩洛哥相似），但 CCC 认证及 GB 检测报告在中国框架下出具，并非摩洛哥进口符合性交付物。
summary.zht: 中國對應的自鎮流 LED 燈安全標準為 GB 24906-2010（普通照明用、電源電壓大於 50 V 的自鎮流 LED 燈——安全要求），與 IEC 62560 對齊，性能由 GB/T 24908 規範。CCC 認證在特定範圍內可能適用於自鎮流 LED 燈。中國燈頭及電壓額定值按中國電網設計（單相 220 V、50 Hz 標稱，與摩洛哥相似），但 CCC 認證及 GB 檢測報告在中國框架下出具，並非摩洛哥進口符合性交付物。

standards_or_laws: GB 24906-2010 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services (supply voltage above 50 V) — safety requirements (SAC/SAMR, aligned with IEC 62560)
GB/T 24908 — Performance requirements for self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services

gap.en: GB 24906 and the Moroccan NM standard both derive from IEC 62560, so the safety technical base is largely harmonized and the 220 V / 50 Hz single-phase grid is similar to China (note China's three-phase nominal is 380 V, but single-phase domestic lighting is 220 V / 50 Hz, matching Morocco). Gaps: (1) the deliverable for Morocco is conformity to the applicable NM standard presented via the in-country importer within the import-conformity process, not a CCC certificate; (2) test reports should be from an ILAC MRA-recognised lab and confirm acceptance for Moroccan conformity; (3) cap type and marking must match what is sold/installed in Morocco (E27/B22 conventions); (4) photobiological classification to IEC 62471 should accompany the lamp safety evidence (see ledma-photobio-01); (5) any Moroccan energy-label obligation is separate (see ledma-ecodesign). Confirm the exact in-force NM reference for self-ballasted LED lamps with the importer.
gap.zh: GB 24906 与摩洛哥 NM 标准均源自 IEC 62560，故安全技术基础基本协调，220 V / 50 Hz 单相电网与中国相似（注意中国三相标称为 380 V，但单相民用照明为 220 V / 50 Hz，与摩洛哥一致）。差距：（1）摩洛哥的交付物是经在摩进口商、在进口符合性流程内提交的对适用 NM 标准的符合性，而非 CCC 证书；（2）检测报告应来自 ILAC MRA 认可实验室并确认其为摩洛哥符合性所接受；（3）灯头型号及标志须与摩洛哥所售/所装一致（E27/B22 惯例）；（4）依据 IEC 62471 的光生物分类应随灯安全证据一并提供（见 ledma-photobio-01）；（5）任何摩洛哥能效标签义务为独立项（见 ledma-ecodesign）。请向进口商确认自镇流 LED 灯现行 NM 引用的确切版本。
gap.zht: GB 24906 與摩洛哥 NM 標準均源自 IEC 62560，故安全技術基礎基本協調，220 V / 50 Hz 單相電網與中國相似（注意中國三相標稱為 380 V，但單相民用照明為 220 V / 50 Hz，與摩洛哥一致）。差距：（1）摩洛哥的交付物是經在摩進口商、在進口符合性流程內提交的對適用 NM 標準的符合性，而非 CCC 證書；（2）檢測報告應來自 ILAC MRA 認可實驗室並確認其為摩洛哥符合性所接受；（3）燈頭型號及標誌須與摩洛哥所售/所裝一致（E27/B22 慣例）；（4）依據 IEC 62471 的光生物分類應隨燈安全證據一併提供（見 ledma-photobio-01）；（5）任何摩洛哥能效標籤義務為獨立項（見 ledma-ecodesign）。請向進口商確認自鎮流 LED 燈現行 NM 引用的確切版本。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where regulated — conformity to the IEC 62560-based NM standard for self-ballasted LED lamps is reviewed within the Ministry of Industry import-conformity process via the in-country importer
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory where in CCC scope — GB 24906-2010 safety compliance applies; CCC may be required for self-ballasted LED lamps in certain scopes

source.publisher: IMANOR — Institut Marocain de Normalisation (Moroccan Institute of Standardisation)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Self-ballasted LED lamps for Morocco are anchored on an IMANOR NM standard adopting IEC 62560, applied with IEC 62471 photobiological safety, with conformity reviewed within the Ministry of Industry import-conformity process via the in-country importer. The safety base is largely harmonized with CN GB 24906 and the 220 V / 50 Hz single-phase grid is similar to China, so data may be reusable, but a CCC certificate is not the Moroccan deliverable — provide ILAC-recognised NM conformity evidence and confirm cap type and the in-force NM reference with the importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向摩洛哥的自镇流 LED 灯以采用 IEC 62560 的 IMANOR NM 标准为锚点，配合 IEC 62471 光生物安全，符合性在工业部进口符合性流程内、经在摩进口商审查。安全基础与中国 GB 24906 基本协调，220 V / 50 Hz 单相电网与中国相似，故数据可能可复用，但 CCC 证书并非摩洛哥交付物——请提供 ILAC 认可的 NM 符合性证据，并向进口商确认灯头型号及现行 NM 引用版本。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向摩洛哥的自鎮流 LED 燈以採用 IEC 62560 的 IMANOR NM 標準為錨點，配合 IEC 62471 光生物安全，符合性在工業部進口符合性流程內、經在摩進口商審查。安全基礎與中國 GB 24906 基本協調，220 V / 50 Hz 單相電網與中國相似，故數據可能可複用，但 CCC 證書並非摩洛哥交付物——請提供 ILAC 認可的 NM 符合性證據，並向進口商確認燈頭型號及現行 NM 引用版本。
